title: Lantern of Revealing

markdown:
# Lantern of Revealing

While lit, this hooded lantern burns for 6 hours on 1 pint of oil, shedding [[bright_light Light]] in a 30-foot radius and [[dim_light Light]] for an additional 30 feet. [[invisible]] creatures and objects are visible as long as they are in the lantern's [[bright_light Light]]. You can take a [[utilize]] action to lower the hood, reducing the lantern's light to [[dim_light Light]] in a 5-foot radius.
